def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s,str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F]', '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms: alif with hamza to alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # Teh marbuta to ha?
    # leave ta marbuta as ة normalized to ه? maybe keep
    # remove punctuation and non letters/digits/space
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s
target_full="لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به"
target_snip="لا يؤمن أح...لما جئت به"
normalize_ar(target_full)
